57536.title: Non-Stop 80s Hits!
57536.description: We got hits... We got hits from the 80s. And guess what? They don't stop! IT'S WHAT IT SAYS ON THE TIN! You're welcome!

57537.title: Gold! Greatest Hits Of The 80s
57537.description: Pencil us in because we've organised the greatest hits of the '80s for you...you're welcome!

57538.title: 40 Global No.1s Of The 80s!
57538.description: Join MTV 80s as we count down 50 of the best hits that hit the top spot worldwide in the 1980s!

57539.title: MTV's Sounds Of 1985!
57539.description: We're powering-up the time machine and going back to celebrate the first years of our MTV lives! This time we land in... 1985!

57540.title: Pump Up The 80s Party!
57540.description: We've chosen all of the best 80s hits to go into one epic 80s party playlist. So pump up the volume and get ready to dance with some classic 80s tunes!

57541.title: ... So 80s!
57541.description: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!
